# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRY: "30 days"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts
    - echo "binary_content" > artifacts/myapp
    - echo "config_content" > artifacts/config.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRY
    reports:
      junit: test-reports.xml

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la
    - echo "Deploying application..."
    - cat artifacts/myapp
    - cat artifacts/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    - ls -la
    - echo "Deploying application to production..."
    - cat artifacts/myapp
    - cat artifacts/config.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
